meta.title: Why the Army's M10 Booker is NOT a tank (but we still call it one)
meta.description:
This might look like a tank, but the U.S. Army swears it isn’t: Let’s talk about the M10 Booker Combat Vehicle, and how it's providing Army infantry troops with a big boost in battlefield firepower.
